items.title_en: Backblaze has stopped backing up your data
items.title_zh: Backblaze 已停止备份你的数据
items.summary_en: A post claims Backblaze has stopped backing up user data, signaling potential service disruption. The note highlights why relying on single vendors can be risky and why users should diversify and verify backups.
items.summary_zh: 一篇博文声称 Backblaze 已停止为用户数据备份，表明可能出现的服务中断。此事强调依赖单一厂商的风险，以及用户应多方备份、并定期核对备份状态。

items.title_en: What is jj and why should I care?
items.title_zh: 什么是 JJ，为什么值得关注？
items.summary_en: An introduction to JJ, a small language designed to teach a concept or approach in programming; the piece explains what it is and why developers might care about language design experiments.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍 JJ 是什么，以及为什么开发者应该关心它，作为语言设计实验的一部分，帮助读者理解简洁性、工具链与语言设计的学习价值。

items.title_en: Rare concert records going on Internet Archive
items.title_zh: 珍稀音乐会录音登陆互联网档案馆
items.summary_en: The Internet Archive is adding thousands of rare concert recordings to its catalog, making long-lost live performances broadly accessible. The collection expands cultural preservation in an open repository while navigating licensing and rights questions. For researchers and enthusiasts, it provides new data for studying how live music evolved over decades.
items.summary_zh: 互联网档案馆正在其目录中新增数千条珍稀音乐会录音，使久违的现场演出得以公开访问。此举推动以开放存储库进行文化遗产保存，同时面临版权与授权方面的挑战。对于研究者与音乐爱好者来说，这为研究现场演出随时间演变提供了新的数据来源。

items.title_en: DaVinci Resolve – Photo
items.title_zh: DaVinci Resolve：照片功能
items.summary_en: Blackmagic Design expands DaVinci Resolve with a photo-focused workflow, integrating still-image editing and color tooling into the suite. The update positions Resolve as a unified platform for creators who blend photography and video, potentially reducing tool fragmentation.
items.summary_zh: Blackmagic Design 将 DaVinci Resolve 引入面向照片的工作流，将静态图像编辑和色彩分级工具整合到套件中。此更新使 Resolve 成为摄影与视频制作的统一平台，或将减少跨工具的需求。

items.title_en: Schools Never Taught Critical Thinking: AI Exposed the Lie
items.title_zh: 学校从未教过批判性思维：AI暴露的谎言
items.summary_en: Schools have historically underemphasized critical thinking, and contemporary AI tools highlight these gaps in public reasoning. The piece argues for education reforms that emphasize evidence evaluation, source literacy, and skeptical inquiry in the age of AI. It suggests practical steps for curriculum and pedagogy.
items.summary_zh: 学校长期低估批判性思维的重要性，而人工智能工具则暴露了公众在信息判断方面的短板。文章主张在 AI 时代通过强化证据评估、来源素养与怀疑性探究来改革教育，并提出具体的教学与课程改进建议。

items.title_en: A new spam policy for “back button hijacking”
items.title_zh: 防止后退按钮劫持的新策略
items.summary_en: Google updates its spam policy to crack down on back button hijacking, labeling manipulative UX that traps users as spam. The policy provides examples and enforcement expectations, encouraging developers to avoid overlays and deceptive navigation.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌更新了反垃圾邮件政策，打击利用后退按钮劫持的页面，视此类操纵性 UX 为垃圾信息。政策给出示例和执行预期，鼓励开发者避免覆盖层、强制导航等误导性设计。

items.title_en: Someone bought 30 WordPress plugins and planted a backdoor in all of them
items.title_zh: 有人买下 30 个 WordPress 插件并在全部插件中植入后门
items.summary_en: A security researcher demonstrates the depth of supply-chain risk in plugin ecosystems by buying 30 WordPress plugins and inserting a backdoor into each one. The stunt highlights how third-party extensions can compromise many sites if integrity checks and monitoring are lax.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究者展示了通过购买 30 个 WordPress 插件并在每一个插件中植入后门，能够大范围入侵网站。这暴露了第三方插件的供应链和信任机制漏洞，强调加强插件审计、完整性校验和运行时监控的重要性。

items.title_en: GitHub Stacked PRs
items.title_zh: GitHub 堆叠 PR
items.summary_en: Stacked PRs bundle several dependent pull requests into a single review flow, letting teams ship large features incrementally. The gh-stack tool provides commands to create, rebase, and track the stack, helping reviewers stay in sync across related changes.
items.summary_zh: 堆叠 PR 将若干相互依赖的 PR 打包到一个评审流程中，便于分阶段交付大型功能。gh-stack 提供创建、变基和跟踪等命令，使评审人能够在相关改动之间保持同步。

items.title_en: NimConf 2026: Dates Announced, Registrations Open
items.title_zh: NimConf 2026：日期公布，注册开启
items.summary_en: NimConf 2026 has announced dates and opened registrations, signaling growing interest in the Nim programming language. The event will feature talks on language design, tooling, and performance from the Nim community. It’s a barometer of Nim’s maturation and community activity.
items.summary_zh: NimConf 2026 已公布日期并开启注册，显示 Nim 语言社区的持续热度。大会将聚焦语言设计、工具链与性能方面的进展，并邀请社区开发者分享最新成果。

items.title_en: Introspective Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 自省式扩散语言模型
items.summary_en: Introspective diffusion language models aim to improve generation by having the model inspect and refine its own outputs during the diffusion process. This self-evaluation approach could reduce hallucinations and improve reliability on long or complex tasks. If practical, it could influence future LM design and prompting strategies.
items.summary_zh: 自省式扩散语言模型通过在扩散过程中让模型审视并改进自己的输出，提升生成的准确性与稳定性。该方法有望减少幻觉现象，尤其是在长文本或复杂任务中的表现。若落地，将影响未来的语言模型设计与提示策略。

items.title_en: Lean proved this program correct; then I found a bug
items.title_zh: Lean 证明了该程序正确；随后我发现了一个漏洞
items.summary_en: Lean proved the program correct, but a subsequent bug exposed a mismatch between the formal model and the real implementation. The post underscores that formal proofs are not a substitute for testing and real-world validation. It also highlights how small modeling gaps can lead to surprising failures.
items.summary_zh: Lean 证明了该程序正确；随后作者发现实现与模型之间的不匹配导致了漏洞。该文强调形式化证明不能替代测试和现实世界的验证。还指出微小的建模差异也会导致意想不到的失败。

items.title_en: The secrets of the Shinkansen
items.title_zh: 新干线
items.summary_en: Behind the Shinkansen, a suite of engineering and operational choices sustains reliability at scale, from dedicated tracks to advanced signaling and earthquake resilience.
items.summary_zh: 介绍新干线背后的工程与运营要点，如何通过专用轨道、先进信号系统和抗震设计实现高可靠性。文中还分享了可供其他铁路借鉴的安全、运维节奏与乘客体验方面的要点。

items.title_en: The Future of Everything Is Lies, I Guess: Work
items.title_zh: 未来的一切都是谎言，我想：工作
items.summary_en: The post challenges rosy forecasts about the future of work and argues that many predictions overlook practical constraints and human factors. It invites readers to rethink productivity, compensation, and skills in a world where technology reshapes tasks but old assumptions persist. The piece cautions against over-optimistic narratives and emphasizes grounded planning.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑关于未来工作的乐观预测，认为许多预言忽视了现实约束和人类因素。呼吁在科技重塑工作任务的同时，重新思考生产力、报酬与技能的分配，并警惕过于美好的叙述，强调务实的规划。

items.title_en: The Case Against Gameplay Loops
items.title_zh: 反对游戏玩法循环的论点
items.summary_en: Argues against endless gameplay loops, arguing they undermine meaningful progression and player engagement. Proposes alternatives such as varied pacing, meaningful choice, and emergent systems that reward exploration and creativity.
items.summary_zh: 提出对无尽玩法循环的反对，认为此类设计削弱了有意义的成长与玩家参与度。建议采用多样化节奏、真实选择和具涌现性的系统等替代方案，以鼓励探索与创造。

items.title_en: Distributed DuckDB Instance
items.title_zh: 分布式 DuckDB 实例
items.summary_en: A distributed DuckDB instance aims to run analytical queries across multiple nodes, enabling larger-scale analytics than a single process. This direction tackles data distribution, parallel execution, and fault tolerance, signaling scalable analytics for analytics workloads.
items.summary_zh: 提出在多节点上运行 DuckDB 的分布式实例，以并行化分析查询、突破单进程的容量限制。该方向需解决数据分布、并行执行和故障恢复等挑战，代表分析型工作负载的可扩展性探索。

items.title_en: Sometimes powerful people just do dumb shit
items.title_zh: 有时有权势的人也会做蠢事
items.summary_en: An essay reflecting on how powerful individuals sometimes act foolishly, offering observations about accountability and the consequences for tech and leadership.
items.summary_zh: 讨论掌权者偶尔犯错的现象，反思权力、问责与技术行业中的决策后果。

items.title_en: Ransomware Is Growing Three Times Faster Than the Spending Meant to Stop It
items.title_zh: 勒索软件增长速度是阻止它的支出增速的三倍
items.summary_en: Ransomware incidents are growing three times faster than security spending intended to stop them. This mismatch signals that attackers can outpace defenses, prompting calls for smarter allocation of cybersecurity resources and vigilance by organizations and policymakers.
items.summary_zh: 勒索软件事件的增速超过了对抗防护的预算增长，表明攻击者的效率超过了防御者的投入。文章呼吁更高效的网络安全资金分配，并提醒组织与政策制定者保持警惕。

items.title_en: Nothing Ever Happens: Polymarket bot that always buys No on non-sports markets
items.title_zh: 没有什么事会发生：一个在非体育市场总是买‘否’的 Polymarket 机器人
items.summary_en: A Polymarket bot consistently places 'No' bets on non-sports markets, revealing a recurring pattern in market dynamics that automated strategies can exploit. This raises questions about prediction-market design and how such bots can skew odds or drain liquidity.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Polymarket 机器人在非体育市场持续以‘否’下注，暴露了市场机制中的漏洞和自动化策略的潜在影响。此现象引发对预测市场设计、赔率偏差以及流动性消耗的讨论。

items.title_en: The exponential curve behind open source backlogs
items.title_zh: 开源积压的指数曲线
items.summary_en: The post argues backlog growth in open source projects accelerates exponentially due to factors like dependency complexity, limited maintainer bandwidth, and funding gaps. It discusses implications for reliability and sustainability and suggests governance or funding strategies to address the problem.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出开源项目的积压随依赖复杂性、维护者资源有限以及资金缺口等因素而呈指数级增长。讨论对可靠性与可持续性的影响，并提出治理与资金方面的应对策略。

items.title_en: WiiFin – Jellyfin Client for Nintendo Wii
items.title_zh: WiiFin：面向 Nintendo Wii 的 Jellyfin 客户端
items.summary_en: WiiFin is a Jellyfin client for the Nintendo Wii, enabling media streaming on retro hardware. It demonstrates how open-source media projects extend to older consoles, though the experience is constrained by the platform's limits.
items.summary_zh: WiiFin 是面向 Nintendo Wii 的 Jellyfin 客户端，允许在这台老旧主机上从 Jellyfin 服务器流媒体。该项目展示了开源媒体生态向旧硬件的扩展潜力，但受限于硬件性能与控制体验。

items.title_en: Make tmux pretty and usable (2024)
items.title_zh: 让 tmux 更美观、更易用
items.summary_en: A practical guide to customizing tmux, covering themes, status bars, fonts, and key bindings to improve aesthetics and workflow. It shares concrete configurations and tips for a more pleasant, productive terminal multiplexer experience.
items.summary_zh: 这篇指南给出实用的 tmux 自定义方法，涵盖主题、状态栏、字体和快捷键等，提升外观与工作流。通过具体的配置建议，帮助开发者把终端多路复用器变得更好用。

items.title_en: US appeals court declares 158-year-old home distilling ban unconstitutional
items.title_zh: 158年历史的家庭蒸馏禁令被判违宪
items.summary_en: An appeals court struck down a long-standing home distilling ban as unconstitutional, signaling a notable shift in how aging alcohol regulations are interpreted. The decision could influence hobbyist distillers and spark broader debate about regulatory modernization in the U.S.
items.summary_zh: 联邦上诉法院裁定一项历时158年的家庭蒸馏禁令违宪，标志着对过时酒精法规的重大挑战。此判决可能影响爱好者自行酿酒的合规性，并推动监管现代化的讨论。

items.title_en: Servo is now available on crates.io
items.title_zh: Servo 现已在 crates.io 上架
items.summary_en: Servo, the Rust-based browser engine, is now published as a crates.io crate. This makes it easier for developers to depend on Servo directly from their Rust projects and experiment with its components like WebRender. The release could accelerate integration efforts and broader experimentation within the Rust ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Rust 生态中的浏览器引擎 Servo 现已以 crates.io 包形式发布。开发者可以直接在 Rust 项目中依赖 Servo，并尝试其组件如 WebRender。此举可能加速在 Rust 生态内对渲染模块的集成和实验。

items.title_en: My brother's minesweeper site (minesweeper.org) has been running for 27 years
items.title_zh: 我兄弟的 Minesweeper 网站 Minesweeper.org 已运营 27 年
items.summary_en: A personal piece celebrating a brother's 27-year-old Minesweeper site, reflecting on the enduring culture of classic games and the Internet's long-running hobby sites.
items.summary_zh: 作者以家人经营的 Minesweeper 站点为线索，纪念其运营27年，反映经典游戏与网络长期存在的社区文化。

items.title_en: Building a CLI for all of Cloudflare
items.title_zh: 为 Cloudflare 构建一个覆盖全域的 CLI 工具
items.summary_en: Cloudflare demonstrates a local explorer CLI that lets developers probe and test Cloudflare features offline, speeding iteration and debugging.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 展示了一个本地 CLI 探索工具，便于开发者在离线状态下试用和查看 Cloudflare 的功能，从而提升开发效率与离线调试能力。文章讨论了如何设计一个安全且易用、覆盖广泛功能的命令行界面。

items.title_en: Multi-Agentic Software Development Is a Distributed Systems Problem
items.title_zh: 多代理软件开发本质是分布式系统问题
items.summary_en: Software development involving multiple agents (LLMs) is fundamentally a distributed systems challenge. It discusses coordination, consistency, and observability, proposing patterns like distributed logs and orchestration to enable scalable collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提出多代理软件开发本质上是一个分布式系统问题，涉及协作、一致性、观测与调度等挑战。给出通过分布式日志、编排等模式来实现跨代理协作的思路。

items.title_en: Microsoft isn't removing Copilot from Windows 11, it's just renaming it
items.title_zh: 微软并未删除 Windows 11 的 Copilot，只是改名
items.summary_en: Microsoft is keeping Copilot in Windows 11 but rebranding it, signaling a broader strategy to unify AI-assisted features across Windows. The rename could affect user expectations and how privacy and data usage are communicated.
items.summary_zh: 微软保留 Windows 11 版 Copilot，仅重新命名，显示出将 AI 助力功能统一到 Windows 生态的策略。改名可能影响用户预期，并对隐私与数据使用的传达产生影响。

items.title_en: I Found It: The Best Free Restaurant Bread in America
items.title_zh: 我发现了美国最好吃的免费餐前面包
items.summary_en: An eye-opening restaurant guide praising the best free bread across the U.S., noting that a simple free loaf can be a delightful indicator of hospitality and bakery craft.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于全美最佳免费餐前面包的餐馆指南，强调免费面包在餐饮热情与烘焙技艺中的小而美的体现。

items.title_en: Can Claude Fly a Plane?
items.title_zh: Claude 能否开飞机？
items.summary_en: A test of Claude in a flight-relevant context highlights the current AI's limitations in safety-critical tasks. It underscores the necessity for human oversight and strict boundaries when deploying AI in complex domains like aviation.
items.summary_zh: 测试 Claude 在飞行相关场景中的表现，强调目前 AI 在安全关键任务上的局限性。提醒在涉及复杂领域的决策中仍需人类监督和严格边界。

items.title_en: Android now stops you sharing your location in photos
items.title_zh: Android 现在阻止你在照片中分享位置信息
items.summary_en: Android now strips location data from photos before sharing, helping protect user privacy when posting to social apps. The change reduces inadvertent location leaks and sets a baseline for privacy controls across mobile platforms, though users can still re-enable when needed.
items.summary_zh: Android 新功能在分享照片前移除位置信息元数据，帮助用户避免地理位置信息泄露。该改动提升隐私保护，但仍允许需要时开启位置标记的选项。

items.title_en: How to make Firefox builds 17% faster
items.title_zh: 让 Firefox 构建快 17%
items.summary_en: Firefox builds get 17% faster thanks to caching WebIDL codegen, which eliminates repeated work across incremental builds. The takeaway is to identify expensive, deterministic codegen steps and cache them to accelerate iteration in large codebases.
items.summary_zh: 通过缓存 WebIDL 代码生成步骤，增量构建中的重复工作被消除，使 Firefox 构建快了约 17%。对于大型代码库，抓住耗时且可重复的代码生成步骤并对其进行缓存，可以显著提升迭代速度。

items.title_en: The AI School Bus Camera Company Blanketing America in Tickets
items.title_zh: AI 校车摄像头公司在美大举开出罚单
items.summary_en: Bloomberg's feature describes a company deploying AI cameras on school buses that issue tickets for traffic violations. Critics question the safety benefits and civil liberties implications, highlighting trade-offs between deterrence and privacy.
items.summary_zh: 报道聚焦一家在校车上部署 AI 摄像头并以此开出罚单的公司，讨论其对安全性与公民自由的影响，质疑其防范效果与隐私权之间的权衡。

items.title_en: MOS tech 6502 8-bit microprocessor in pure SQL powered by Postgres
items.title_zh: MOS 技术的 6502 8 位微处理器纯 SQL 实现
items.summary_en: A project models the 6502 8-bit microprocessor purely in SQL atop Postgres, turning hardware emulation into a database-based experiment. It demonstrates SQL’s versatility for exploring computer architecture concepts.
items.summary_zh: 展示用纯 SQL 在 Postgres 上模拟 6502 8 位微处理器的实现，把硬件架构的教学与实验放在数据库系统里。这个项目体现 SQL 语言的灵活性以及对计算机体系结构教育的趣味性。

items.title_en: Math Is Still Catching Up to the Mysterious Genius of Srinivasa Ramanujan (2024)
items.title_zh: Ramanujan 的神秘天才：数学仍在追赶（2024）
items.summary_en: Quanta Magazine examines how mathematics is catching up to Ramanujan’s genius, with modern methods validating and extending his results.
items.summary_zh: 量子杂志探讨 Ramanujan 的天才如何被现代数学逐步追上与完善，展示新方法如何证明和扩展他的直觉。文章也揭示了他成就中的尚待解决之处，以及这些成果对后续研究的影响。

items.title_en: US Treasury Seeking Access to Anthropic's Mythos to Find Flaws
items.title_zh: 美国财政部寻求访问 Anthropic 的 Mythos 以发现漏洞
items.summary_en: U.S. Treasury seeking access to Anthropic's Mythos to find flaws signals government interest in independent AI safety assessment while raising questions about access, transparency, and vendor relationships.
items.summary_zh: 美国财政部正寻求访问 Anthropic 的 Mythos 以发现漏洞，体现政府对独立 AI 安全评估的兴趣，同时引发对访问、透明度与厂商关系等方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ithihāsas – a character explorer for Hindu epics, built in a few hours
items.title_zh: Show HN：Ithihāsas——用于探索印度史诗人物的快速原型
items.summary_en: Ithihāsas is a lightweight, quickly-built explorer of characters in Hindu epics. It visualizes relationships and story connections, showcasing what can be built in a few hours and serving as a prototype for narrative tools.
items.summary_zh: Ithihāsas 是一个用于探索印度史诗人物的轻量级工具，快速搭建完成。它可可视化人物关系与故事线索，展示短时间原型可以实现的功能，适合作为叙事工具的雏形。

items.title_en: Single-Dose Creatine Reduces Sleep Deprivation-Induced Deterioration
items.title_zh: 单剂量肌酸能降低睡眠剥夺引发的衰退
items.summary_en: A study finds a single dose of creatine can mitigate cognitive and physical performance decline caused by sleep deprivation, suggesting a simple countermeasure for shift workers or new parents. Caveats include small sample size and need for broader validation.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现单剂量肌酸可缓解睡眠不足所致的认知与体能下降，为轮班工作者或新生儿父母等提供了潜在的简便防护手段。需注意样本量较小、需要更大规模验证。

items.title_en: GAIA – Open-source framework for building AI agents that run on local hardware
items.title_zh: GAIA 是一个在本地硬件上运行的 AI 代理的开源框架
items.summary_en: GAIA is an open-source framework for building AI agents that run offline on local hardware, enabling privacy-preserving and low-latency AI workflows. The project emphasizes modular agent composition, local computation, and interoperability with popular AI models, reducing reliance on cloud infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: GAIA 是一个在本地硬件上运行 AI 代理的开源框架，支持离线隐私保护和低延迟的 AI 工作流。项目强调模块化代理组合、本地计算，以及与主流 AI 模型的互操作性，降低对云端基础设施的依赖。

items.title_en: TanStack Start Now Support React Server Components
items.title_zh: TanStack 现已支持 React Server Components
items.summary_en: TanStack Start Now adds support for React Server Components, enabling server-driven rendering paths and potentially lighter client bundles. For developers, this expands architectural options while introducing trade-offs around data fetching and streaming.
items.summary_zh: TanStack Start Now 现已支持 React Server Components，为服务端渲染路径和分布式数据流提供新选项。对开发者而言，意味着在架构选择上有更多权衡与机会，同时需要权衡数据获取和客户端负载的权衡点。

items.title_en: N-Day-Bench – Can LLMs find real vulnerabilities in real codebases?
items.title_zh: N-Day-Bench：LLMs 能在真实代码库中发现漏洞吗？
items.summary_en: N-Day-Bench introduces a benchmark to evaluate whether LLMs can discover real vulnerabilities in actual codebases. Results demonstrate potential and current limits of AI-assisted security analysis, guiding prudent deployment in code review tasks.
items.summary_zh: N-Day-Bench 引入一个基准测试，用以评估大型语言模型在真实代码库中发现漏洞的能力。结果展示了 AI 辅助安全分析的潜力与现阶段的局限，为将来在代码审查中的应用提供参考。

items.title_en: Roblox devs now need a subscription to share their games freely
items.title_zh: Roblox 开发者需订阅才能公开分享游戏
items.summary_en: Developers must subscribe to a new publishing evaluation process before their games can be shared publicly. The change acts as a gatekeeper, potentially slowing releases and increasing costs for indie creators, impacting discoverability and revenue.
items.summary_zh: 现在要求开发者在分享游戏前通过新的订阅和审评流程。这个变动相当于设立准入门槛，可能放慢新作上线速度、提高 indie 开发者的成本，并影响游戏的曝光与盈利前景。

items.title_en: War as a Pretext: Gulf States Are Tightening the Screws on Speech–Again
items.title_zh: 战争作为由头：海湾国家再度紧缩言论自由
items.summary_en: Analyzes how Gulf states use war-related pretexts to curb speech, surveillance, and online expression, with implications for tech platforms and journalists operating in or reporting on the region.
items.summary_zh: 分析海湾国家如何以战争为由压缩言论、监控与网络表达，讨论对科技平台、记者及在该地区报道的影响与挑战。

items.title_en: New Orleans's Car-Crash Conspiracy
items.title_zh: 新奥尔良的车祸阴谋论
items.summary_en: The New Yorker piece investigates a car crash conspiracy in New Orleans, tracing misinformation patterns, narrative construction, and potential misreporting. It sheds light on how digital media can shape public perception around a tragedy.
items.summary_zh: 本文深入调查新奥尔良的一起车祸阴谋论，追踪信息传播、叙事建构及报道中的偏差，揭示数字媒体如何左右公众对事件的看法。

items.title_en: B-trees and database indexes (2024)
items.title_zh: B 树与数据库索引（2024）
items.summary_en: The article explains B-trees and indexing strategies, likely comparing traditional B-trees vs newer structures in 2024; it discusses why proper indexing matters for query performance and how to choose between B-trees, B+ trees, and other indexes; maybe covers caching and statistics.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解 B 树与数据库索引的原理与实现，比较 2024 年的更新与优化，强调正确的索引选择对查询性能的影响，并介绍在实际场景中如何权衡不同实现。

items.title_en: Visualizing CPU Pipelining (2024)
items.title_zh: 可视化 CPU 流水线（2024）
items.summary_en: This post visualizes CPU pipeline stages and hazards, helping readers grasp how instruction-level parallelism and stalls affect performance. It provides diagrams and explanations that are accessible to both students and professionals.
items.summary_zh: 本文可视化 CPU 流水线的各阶段与冒险，帮助读者理解指令级并行性与停顿如何影响性能。配以图示与解释，适合学生与专业人士阅读。

items.title_en: Show HN: Kontext CLI – Credential broker for AI coding agents in Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Kontekst CLI——面向 AI 编码代理的凭据中介（Go 语言实现）
items.summary_en: Go-based Kontext CLI acts as a credential broker for AI coding agents, simplifying secure credential management and rotation when integrating code-generation AIs. It demonstrates practical tooling to reduce credential leakage and friction in AI-assisted development.
items.summary_zh: 这款用 Go 实现的 Kontekst CLI 提供面向 AI 编码代理的凭据中介，便于在集成代码助手 AI 时进行安全的凭据管理与轮换。展示了在 AI 辅助开发中的实用工具与风险控制思路。

items.title_en: MEMS Array Chip Can Project Video the Size of a Grain of Sand
items.title_zh: MEMS阵列芯片能投射出如沙粒大小的视频
items.summary_en: A MEMS-photonics chip demonstrates ultra-compact video projection at grain-of-sand scale, signaling advances in micro-display tech. The breakthrough points to potential applications in wearables, AR/VR, and mini projectors.
items.summary_zh: 新型 MEMS 光子芯片实现了极小尺度的视频投射，尺寸可达到沙粒等级。该突破揭示了微型显示技术的进展及在可穿戴设备、AR/VR 和微型投影设备等领域的潜在应用。

items.title_en: Just Enough Chimera Linux
items.title_zh: Chimera Linux 的最小化安装指南
items.summary_en: This guide shows a minimal Chimera Linux installation with ZFS as root, outlining practical steps to get a lean, reliable system up and running. The guide focuses on a small footprint and thoughtful configuration for experiments or hosting workloads.
items.summary_zh: 该指南演示在 Chimera Linux 上以 ZFS 作为根分区的最小化安装方案，提供从引导到基本配置的实用步骤，帮助你快速搭建一个精简且可靠的系统。内容聚焦于低占用和理性配置，适合做实验或托管负载。

items.title_en: Initial mainline video capture and camera support for Rockchip RK3588
items.title_zh: Rockchip RK3588 首次实现主线视频捕获与摄像头支持
items.summary_en: Collabora reports initial mainline Linux kernel support for video capture and cameras on the RK3588, enabling better Linux on RK3588-based devices. This milestone helps developers ship hardware with upstream drivers and smoother support for cameras and video pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Collabora 公告 RK3588 已实现主线 Linux 内核的视频捕获与摄像头支持的初步阶段，提升基于 RK3588 的设备在 Linux 下的兼容性。该里程碑为开发者提供更直接的上游驱动和更顺畅的视频/摄像头管线支持。

items.title_en: On hacker mindset
items.title_zh: 黑客思维
items.summary_en: Explores the hacker mindset as a pragmatic blend of curiosity, experimentation, and resilience, with guidance on fostering it in teams and education to improve security and software craftsmanship.
items.summary_zh: 探讨黑客思维是一种以好奇心、实验精神与韧性为核心的务实混合，并给出在团队与教育中培育这种思维以提升安全性与软件工匠精神的建议。

items.title_en: Why it’s impossible to measure England’s coastline
items.title_zh: 为什么测量英格兰海岸线几乎不可能
items.summary_en: Explains the coastline paradox and why measuring a coastline becomes longer as you measure with smaller rulers, using England's coast as a case study. The piece touches on geometry, scale, and practical implications for maps, climate models, and governance.
items.summary_zh: 解释了海岸线悖论：随着测量单位变小，海岸线长度会变得更长。以英格兰海岸为例，讨论了尺度、几何与对地图、气候模型和治理的实际影响。

items.title_en: Tracking down a 25% Regression on LLVM RISC-V
items.title_zh: 在 LLVM 的 RISC-V 上追踪 25% 的回归
items.summary_en: A developer tracks a substantial performance regression (~25%) in LLVM's RISC-V backend, outlining steps like narrowing optimization passes, inspecting code generation, and validating with benchmarks. The work illustrates the fragility of compiler backends and the value of regression testing.
items.summary_zh: 开发者追踪了 LLVM RISC-V 后端的显著性能回归（约 25%），描述了收缩优化阶段、检查代码生成以及回归基准测试等定位步骤。这一工作凸显了编译器后端的脆弱性以及回归测试的重要性。

items.title_en: The Journal of C Language Translation
items.title_zh: C 语言翻译学报
items.summary_en: The Journal of C Language Translation curates translations of C language resources, bridging language gaps for researchers and practitioners.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 C 语言翻译学刊这一学术渠道，聚焦将 C 语言资源翻译成其他语言以促进研究与教育。

items.title_en: I just want simple S3
items.title_zh: 我只想要一个简单的 S3
items.summary_en: The post argues for a simpler S3 experience or proposes a minimal S3 API layer to reduce boilerplate, with practical tips or a simpler alternative; It may propose a design for a friendlier S3-like storage.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张让 S3 使用更简单，提出简化 API 层或替代方案的要点，降低实现成本并提高开发效率。

items.title_en: UpDown: Efficient Manycore based on Many Threading & Scalable Memory Parallelism
items.title_zh: UpDown：基于大规模线程与可扩展内存并行性的多核架构
items.summary_en: UpDown introduces an efficient manycore design emphasizing heavy threading and scalable memory parallelism to boost performance and energy efficiency for HPC workloads.
items.summary_zh: UpDown：基于大规模线程与可扩展内存并行性的多核架构。论文描述了面向高性能计算的多核设计目标和可能的实现思路。

items.title_en: If you started a company two years ago, many assumptions are no longer true
items.title_zh: 两年前创业者的假设如今多已不再成立
items.summary_en: The piece argues that many startup assumptions made two years ago no longer hold due to shifting funding climate, consumer behavior, and competitive pressure. Founders should re-evaluate markets, unit economics, and strategies, pivoting or sunsetting unviable plans if needed.
items.summary_zh: 两年前创业者的假设如今多已不再成立，原因包括资金环境、市场需求与竞争格局的变化。创始人应重新评估市场、单位经济与策略，必要时调整方向或退出不再可行的计划。

items.title_en: Introduction to Obsidian
items.title_zh: Obsidian 入门
items.summary_en: Obsidian is a Markdown-based note app with bidirectional links and a knowledge graph. This intro covers core concepts, organizing notes, and why it shines for personal knowledge management and research workflows.
items.summary_zh: Obsidian 是一个基于 Markdown 的笔记应用，支持双向链接和知识图谱。本文介绍核心概念、笔记组织方式，以及它在个人知识管理与研究工作流中的优势。

items.title_en: Bypass Paywalls Clean Chrome
items.title_zh: 绕过付费墙的 Chrome 插件
items.summary_en: A Chrome extension aims to bypass paywalls, prompting discussion about legality, ethics, and the impact on reader access and publisher revenue. The piece weighs the trade-offs between user convenience and content monetization.
items.summary_zh: 讨论绕过付费墙的 Chrome 插件及其引发的法律与伦理争议，同时点出此类工具对网页体验与出版商收入的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Write less code, be more responsible
items.title_zh: 写更少的代码，也要更负责任
items.summary_en: Promotes minimalism in code without sacrificing correctness, arguing that fewer lines can reduce bugs and maintenance cost. The piece offers guidelines for safer APIs, clearer abstractions, and responsible design choices that improve long-term reliability.
items.summary_zh: 强调在保持正确性的前提下追求代码简洁，认为更少的代码有助于降低错误和维护成本。给出在设计 API、抽象和实现方面的实用建议，助力提升长期可靠性与可维护性。

items.title_en: Air Powered Segment Display? [video]
items.title_zh: 空气驱动的分段显示？[视频]
items.summary_en: Shows a novel air-powered segmented display prototype, illustrating a playful approach to actuation and typography. The video demonstrates low-power, ambient motion as an alternative to motorized displays and invites discussion on hardware prototyping tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一种新颖的空气驱动分段显示原型，展示了驱动与排版的有趣结合。该视频展示了低功耗、环境友好的驱动方式，探讨了与电机驱动显示相比的权衡。

items.title_en: Design and implementation of DuckDB internals
items.title_zh: DuckDB 内部设计与实现
items.summary_en: Deep dive into DuckDB's internal architecture, including storage, query execution, and vectorized processing. The write-up explains how DuckDB achieves high performance as an embedded analytics DB and the tradeoffs behind its design. Worth reading for developers building in-process analytics or database systems.
items.summary_zh: 本文深入讲解 DuckDB 的内部架构，涵盖存储结构、查询执行与向量化处理等核心设计。介绍了 DuckDB 作为嵌入式分析型数据库在性能上的取舍与实现细节，如向量化执行与快速启动的设计。对打算构建本地数据库或分析工具的开发者有借鉴意义。

items.title_en: Rust Threads on the GPU
items.title_zh: Rust 线程在 GPU 上
items.summary_en: It discusses feasibility, trade-offs, and the future of Rust-based parallelism on graphics hardware.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在 GPU 上实现 Rust 风格的并发线程，探索对 GPU 加速工作负载的潜在提升与风险。分析将 Rust 的安全性与并行性应用于显卡硬件的可行性与未来方向。

items.title_en: Franklin's bad ads for Apple ][ clones and the beloved impersonator they depict
items.title_zh: 弗兰克林广告下的 Apple II 克隆机与被模仿者的形象
items.summary_en: An examination of Franklin's marketing for Apple II clones and the personas the campaigns used, highlighting how early clone marketing shaped public perception of the hardware. The piece reflects on nostalgia, branding tricks, and the broader culture of 1980s computing.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾弗兰克林对 Apple II 克隆机的早期广告及其塑造的形象，指出这类营销如何影响公众对这类硬件的认知。文中探讨了怀旧情感、品牌策略，以及 1980 年代计算机文化的整体氛围。

items.title_en: What we learned building a Rust runtime for TypeScript
items.title_zh: 用 Rust 构建 TypeScript 运行时的教训
items.summary_en: This article shares lessons from building a Rust runtime for executing TypeScript, covering interoperability, performance tradeoffs, and mapping TS semantics to a native runtime. The piece offers practical design choices and cautions for similar language-runtime projects.
items.summary_zh: 总结了用 Rust 构建 TypeScript 运行时的经验教训，涉及互操作性、性能取舍以及将 TypeScript 语义映射到原生运行时的挑战。文章给出实用的设计选项与对类似语言运行时项目的警示。

items.title_en: The M×N problem of tool calling and open-source models
items.title_zh: 工具调用与开源模型的 M×N 问题
items.summary_en: Coordination of multiple tools with open-source models creates a combinatorial M×N problem, leading to maintenance, compatibility, and reliability challenges. The post offers patterns and practices for designing tool interfaces, versioning, and governance to tame the complexity.
items.summary_zh: 在 AI 代理中并用多种工具与开源模型时，会产生一个 M×N 的组合性问题，带来维护、兼容性与可靠性挑战。文中提出设计工具接口、版本控制与治理的模式和实践。

items.title_en: A soft robot has no problem moving with no motor and no gears
items.title_zh: 软体机器人在没有马达和齿轮的情况下也能移动
items.summary_en: Soft robots move without traditional motors or gears by exploiting flexible materials, fluids, or smart actuators. This approach offers simpler, safer motion with potential for delicate manipulation and soft grippers in real-world tasks.
items.summary_zh: 软体机器人通过柔性材料、流体驱动或智能执行元件实现无传统马达和齿轮的移动。这样的设计带来更简单、对环境更友好的运动，适用于柔性抓取和安全敏感的应用场景。

items.title_en: Lumina – a statically typed web-native language for JavaScript and WASM
items.title_zh: Lumina：面向 JavaScript 与 WASM 的静态类型化网页原生语言
items.summary_en: Lumina is a statically typed web-native language designed for web targets, interoperating with JavaScript and WebAssembly. The language aims to improve safety and performance for web apps while keeping developer ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Lumina 是一门面向网页原生的静态类型语言，设计用于与 JavaScript 和 WebAssembly 的互操作。它旨在在提升网络应用安全性与性能的同时，保持开发者的使用体验。

items.title_en: I shipped a transaction bug, so I built a linter
items.title_zh: 我提交了一个交易漏洞，于是我写了一个事务 linter
items.summary_en: After releasing a transaction bug, the author built a Go-based linter to catch transaction-related mistakes before they hit production. The tooling flags risky patterns to prevent data integrity issues and boosts developer confidence.
items.summary_zh: 在上线后发现一个事务相关的漏洞后，作者用 Go 构建了一个事务性静态分析工具来预防此类错误。该 linter 能识别常见的事务模式风险，帮助在提交前发现潜在的数据完整性问题，从而提高开发效率。

items.title_en: Anastasia (1997) live action reference material
items.title_zh: 安娜塔西亚(1997) 的真人参考素材
items.summary_en: An Anastasia (1997) live-action reference material piece reveals how live-action footage guided animation decisions for Don Bluth’s project. It offers new insight for fans and researchers into classic animation production.
items.summary_zh: 揭示在安娜塔西娅 (1997) 的动画制作中使用的真人参考素材，展示参考影像如何影响角色设计和动画决策。为怀旧粉丝和研究者提供了关于动画幕后工艺的新线索。

items.title_en: The acyclic e-graph: Cranelift's mid-end optimizer
items.title_zh: 无环 e-图：Cranelift 的中端优化器
items.summary_en: An acyclic e-graph design powers Cranelift's mid-end optimizer, enabling more scalable and efficient optimization by representing expressions as equivalence classes. The approach can improve compile-time performance and optimization quality for JIT/WebAssembly workloads. This work illustrates how data-structure choices affect compiler backends.
items.summary_zh: 无环 e-图设计支撑 Cranelift 的中端优化器，使表达式以等价类形式表示，从而提升优化的可扩展性与效率。此方法有望提高 JIT/WebAssembly 场景的编译速度与优化质量。

items.title_en: The Great Majority: Body Snatching and Burial Reform in 19th-Century Britain
items.title_zh: 大多数人群：19 世纪英国的盗尸与埋葬改革
items.summary_en: The Great Majority surveys 19th-century Britain’s body-snatching and burial reform, examining Anatomy Act debates, class power, and public health concerns. It shows how legal and social reforms intersected with medical science and policy.
items.summary_zh: 本篇综述探讨19世纪英国的盗尸风潮与埋葬改革，分析解剖法案辩论、阶级权力与公共卫生关切，揭示法律、社会改革与医学科学之间的交叉影响。

items.title_en: Tool to explore regularly sampled time series
items.title_zh: 用于探索定期采样时间序列的工具
items.summary_en: A tool designed to explore regularly sampled time series enables efficient analysis and visualization of periodic data features and trends.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个用于探索定期采样时间序列的数据工具，便于分析与可视化周期性数据的特征与趋势。

items.title_en: Show HN: Run GUIs as Scripts
items.title_zh: Show HN：Run GUIs as Scripts
items.summary_en: Show HN: Run GUIs as Scripts describes a project that lets you automate GUI tasks by running GUI actions as scripts. It highlights use cases in automation and testing, while noting fragility and platform limitations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Run GUIs as Scripts 介绍了一个通过将 GUI 操作作为脚本来实现 GUI 自动化的项目，适用于自动化与测试等场景，同时也指出了易脆弱性与平台限制。

items.title_en: A name is succession, legacy and celebration in Japan's Kabuki theater
items.title_zh: 日本歌舞伎中的名字：传承与庆典
items.summary_en: In Kabuki, stage names carry lineage, legacy, and celebration. The practice signals mastery and honors family heritage within the art form.
items.summary_zh: 在日本歌舞伎传统中，艺名承载家族世袭、传承与庆典的意义。名号的传承被视为对师承关系与戏艺水平的象征，反映了文化与表演艺术的延续。

items.title_en: Nucleus Nouns
items.title_zh: 核心名词
items.summary_en: Introduces nucleus nouns as the central anchors that carry most meaning in language or prompts, with modifiers adding nuance. The piece argues that focusing on nucleus nouns improves clarity, memory, and efficiency when communicating with AI.
items.summary_zh: 提出“核心名词”的概念，指在语言或提示中承载大部分含义的核心名词，其它修饰语用于增加细微语义。强调围绕核心名词构造表达有助于提升与 AI 交互时的清晰度、记忆性与效率。
